image.alt: The grand entrance gate of Luna Park on a sunny day

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about visiting our amusement park

hours.question: What are the park hours?
hours.answer: We're open daily from 10:00 AM to 10:00 PM during peak season (June-August), and 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM during off-season. Hours may vary on holidays, so please check our website before your visit.

cost.question: How much does admission cost?
cost.answer: General admission is €49.99 for adults and €39.99 for children under 12. Seniors (65+) get a discounted rate of €44.99. Season passes and group discounts are also available. Parking is included with admission.

height.question: Are there height restrictions on rides?
height.answer: Yes, safety is our top priority. Height restrictions vary by ride, ranging from 36 inches to 54 inches. Children under the minimum height can enjoy our kiddie rides and family-friendly attractions. Height measurement stations are located at each ride entrance.

food.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
food.answer: Outside food and beverages are not permitted in the park, with the exception of baby food, formula, and special dietary needs with proper documentation. We have numerous dining options throughout the park to satisfy every craving.

accessibility.question: Is the park wheelchair accessible?
accessibility.answer: Our park is fully wheelchair accessible with paved pathways, accessible restrooms, and wheelchair-friendly rides. We also offer wheelchair rentals at the main entrance for €15 per day.

rain.question: What should I do if it rains?
rain.answer: Many of our attractions operate rain or shine! We have covered areas, indoor attractions, and gift shops to keep you entertained. If severe weather occurs, some outdoor rides may temporarily close for safety reasons.

fastpass.question: Do you offer fast pass or skip-the-line options?
fastpass.answer: Yes! Our Express Pass allows you to skip regular lines on participating rides. Express Passes are €29.99 per person and can be purchased at the gate or online. VIP packages with additional perks are also available.

storage.question: Where can I store my belongings?
storage.answer: Lockers are available throughout the park for €8-12 per day depending on size. Free cubbies are provided at select high-thrill rides. We recommend bringing only essentials and leaving valuables in your car or hotel.

scroll.title: Discover Our
scroll.subtitle: From heart-pounding roller coasters to family-friendly rides, explore all the thrilling experiences waiting for you at our amusement park.

coaster.title: 🎢 Thrilling Roller Coasters
coaster.description: Experience heart-pounding excitement on our world-class roller coasters! From gravity-defying loops to breathtaking drops, feel the rush of adrenaline as you soar through twists and turns at incredible speeds. Perfect for thrill-seekers and adventure lovers!

ferris.title: 🎡 Giant Ferris Wheel
ferris.description: Take in breathtaking panoramic views from 200 feet above the park! Our iconic Ferris wheel offers a peaceful escape with stunning vistas of the entire amusement park and surrounding landscape. Perfect for families and romantic moments under the stars.

splash.title: 🌊 Splash Zone Water Rides
splash.description: Cool off and make a splash on our exciting water attractions! From lazy rivers to thrilling water slides and splash pads, beat the heat while having endless fun. Don't forget to bring a change of clothes - you're guaranteed to get soaked!

haunted.title: 👻 Haunted House Experience
haunted.description: Dare to enter our spine-chilling haunted mansion filled with ghosts, ghouls, and surprises around every corner! Navigate through dark corridors, creaky floors, and mysterious rooms. Are you brave enough to make it through to the end?

bumper.title: 🚗 Bumper Car Madness
bumper.description: Bump, crash, and laugh your way around our electrifying bumper car arena! Perfect for all ages, challenge your friends and family to see who can avoid the most collisions. It's pure fun and friendly competition in a safe, controlled environment.

secondWhy.imageAlt: Exciting roller coaster at Luna Park
secondWhy.p1: 32 Family-friendly rides! High-energy entertainment! Delicious food and treats! All in a beautiful park setting just minutes from Entertainment City.
secondWhy.p2: Create lasting memories with thrilling attractions, live shows, and activities perfect for all ages. From gentle rides for little ones to heart-pounding roller coasters for thrill-seekers.
secondWhy.p3: Experience the magic of Luna Park, where adventure meets family tradition.

ferrisWheelSunset.title: Ferris Wheel at Sunset

metadata.title: About Us - Adventure Park
metadata.description: Learn about Adventure Park's history, mission, and the dedicated team that creates magical experiences for millions of visitors each year.
metadata.keywords: park history, mission statement, team, awards, about adventure park, company information

sarahChen.name: Sarah Chen
sarahChen.quote: Every day, we create magical moments that families will cherish forever. Our mission is to make joy accessible to everyone who walks through our gates.
background: With over 15 years of experience in the entertainment industry, Sarah has transformed Luna Park from a local attraction into a world-class destination. Her vision combines cutting-edge technology with timeless family values.

Before joining Luna Park, Sarah served as Vice President of Operations at Disneyland Paris, where she oversaw the daily operations of one of Europe's most visited theme parks. She holds an MBA from Harvard Business School and a degree in Hospitality Management from Cornell University.

marcusRodriguez.name: Marcus Rodriguez
marcusRodriguez.quote: Safety and guest satisfaction are our top priorities. Every decision we make is guided by these two fundamental principles.
background: Marcus brings 20+ years of theme park operations experience, having worked at Universal Studios, Six Flags, and Cedar Fair. His expertise spans ride safety, guest services, and operational efficiency.

He's a certified safety inspector and has implemented industry-leading safety protocols that have earned Luna Park multiple safety awards. Marcus is passionate about training staff and ensuring every guest has a safe, memorable experience.

emilyWatson.name: Dr. Emily Watson
emilyWatson.quote: We're not just building rides; we're creating experiences that push the boundaries of what's possible in family entertainment.
background: Dr. Watson holds a PhD in Mechanical Engineering from MIT and has designed over 25 major attractions worldwide. Her innovative approach combines engineering excellence with creative storytelling.

She leads our R&D department, developing next-generation ride technology that prioritizes both thrill and safety. Emily's work has been recognized with multiple industry awards, including the prestigious 'Innovator of the Year' from the International Association of Amusement Parks.

davidKim.name: David Kim
davidKim.quote: Every interaction matters. We're not just providing entertainment; we're creating memories that last a lifetime.
background: David has revolutionized guest experience at Luna Park through data-driven insights and personalized service. His background in hospitality management and psychology helps him understand what makes experiences truly memorable.

He's implemented innovative programs like our 'Memory Maker' initiative and 'Guest First' training program, which have resulted in a 95% guest satisfaction rating. David believes that exceptional service is the foundation of our success.

timeline.title: Our Journey Through Time

cancelled.cancelledMessage: Your payment was cancelled and no charges were made.
cancelled.explanation: Your payment was cancelled. This could happen for several reasons:
cancelled.reason1: You clicked the back button or closed the payment window
cancelled.reason3: There was an issue with your payment method
cancelled.reason4: You chose to cancel the transaction
cancelled.noChargesMessage: No payment was processed and no charges were made to your account. Your cart items are still saved if you want to try again.
cancelled.helpMessage: If you're experiencing payment issues or need assistance, our support team is here to help.
